summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Hero Carousel feature. All 18 test cases passed. The carousel renders full-screen with background images, auto-slides every 6 seconds, navigation arrows and dot indicators work correctly, CTA buttons function properly, and RTL support for Arabic works as expected.

passed: TEST 1: Hero Carousel renders full-screen (1920x1080) on homepage
TEST 2: Hero title 'Build at Cost' visible with gold color
TEST 3: Hero subtitle visible - 'We don't sell houses; we manage your construction project.'
TEST 4: 'Start Your Journey' CTA button visible
TEST 6: All 3 stats visible (Legal Security, Complete Legal Management, Zero Risk)
TEST 7: Navigation arrows (prev/next) visible on left/right sides
TEST 8: All 4 dot indicators visible at bottom
TEST 9: Next arrow works - slide changes (dot widths: [40,12,12,12] -> [12,40,12,12])
TEST 10: Prev arrow works - returns to previous slide
TEST 11: Dot indicator click navigates to specific slide (dot 2 clicked, width became 40)
TEST 12: Auto-slide works - slide changed after 7 seconds (dot widths changed)
TEST 13: 'Start Your Journey' button scrolls to #journey section (scrollY: 1080)
TEST 14: 'Learn More' button navigates to /about page
TEST 15: Arabic RTL support works - title shows 'البناء بالتكلفة', HTML dir='rtl', navigation works
TEST 16: Mobile responsive - carousel full-width (390px), all elements visible, navigation works
TEST 17: Spanish language works - title shows 'Construye al Costo'
TEST 18: Hover effects present - arrows have hover:bg-black/50, hover:scale-110

hero_carousel_rendering.details: Full-screen carousel with 4 background images, crossfade transitions

navigation_arrows.details: Left/right arrows work to change slides, have hover effects (scale-110, bg-black/50)

dot_indicators.details: 4 dots at bottom, active dot is wider (40px vs 12px), clickable to navigate

hero_content.details: Title, subtitle, description, CTA buttons, and 3 stats visible over carousel

rtl_arabic_support.details: HTML dir='rtl', content in Arabic, navigation arrows in correct positions

mobile_responsive.details: Full-width on mobile (390px), all elements visible and functional

multi_language.details: EN, ES, AR all work correctly with proper translations

test_credentials: No auth required for homepage testing
seed_data_creation: None - using static carousel images from Unsplash
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero Carousel feature fully tested and working. Carousel uses 4 Unsplash images with crossfade transitions (1200ms). Auto-slide interval is 6 seconds. Active dot indicator is wider (40px) than inactive (12px). Cookie banner may appear on first visit - dismiss with 'Accept All' button. Console shows 401 errors for /api/auth/me which is expected for non-logged users.
